arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal & Chelsea believe they can sign €80m-rated star for just €50m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are both keeping a close eye on Sporting Lisbon defender Ousmane Diomande ahead of this summer, CaughtOffside understands. The talented young Ivory Coast international has long been on the radar of several top clubs around Europe, and it’s currently Arsenal and Chelsea showing the strongest interest in him. arts.ttl: PSG star leaves Man Utd and Arsenal with egg on face after Liverpool triumph
arts.sum: Desire Doue was exceptional from the bench in both legs as Paris Saint-Germain edged past Liverpool on penalties to reach the Champions League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry delivers Mo Salah snub as Arsenal icon names favourite for Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Mo Salah has been the early favourite to win the 2025 Ballon d'Or thanks to his sensational performances for Liverpool this season but Thierry Henry reckons that there's a new frontrunner

arts.ttl: Arsenal sign one of ‘three best in the world’
arts.sum: Arsenal are hiring one of the three best sporting directors in the world in Andrea Berta. The Gunners have been searching for a new sporting director since Edu’s resignation in November 2024, and they identified Berta as the top candidate for the role following his immense spell at Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice sends clear Arsenal message as Mikel Arteta makes Raheem Sterling decision
arts.sum: Declan Rice has fired a three-word message ahead of Arsenal's match against PSV Eindhoven in the second leg of the Champions League round of 16. Arteta said: "It's unique but it's also understanding how the game was played a week ago and the fact everything went in the right direction for us from the beginning .

arts.ttl: 'That's my dream' - William Saliba reveals personal ambition amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: William Saliba is widely regarded as one of the best centre-backs in world football.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Barcelona or Man United? Which club leads the race for Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly at the head of the queue for Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia, but both Manchester United and Barcelona are also said to be interested.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSV Eindhoven – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal face PSV Eindhoven in the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tonight with a huge advantage. The North Londoners are 7-1 ahead on aggregate after a record-breaking night in Eindhoven last week. Barring the unlikeliest comeback in Champions League history, Arsenal will take their place in the quarter-finals for a second successive season. arts.ttl: Arsenal dream Champions League scenario emerges after Liverpool crash out to PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal face PSV Eindhoven in the- second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on March 12. Arsenal look to have been handed a favourable pathway to the Champions League final after Liverpool's shock last-16 defeat to Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Arsenal want to resume negotiations in ‘coming weeks’ – Player open to cashing in
arts.sum: Arsenal’s Leandro Trossard has just over 15 months left on his contract and the north London club are looking to offer him an extension. In September, the Belgium international reportedly received an offer from Al-Ittihad.
